'''kazoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylolith|xylolith]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-z-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylolith|xylolith]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kazoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæzeyeth|kæzeyeth]] || [[word:kæzeyej|kæzeyej]] || [[word:kæzeyesh|kæzeyesh]] || [[word:kæzeye|kæzeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kazozoyoth|kazozoyoth]] || [[word:kazozoyoj|kazozoyoj]] || [[word:kazozoyosh|kazozoyosh]] || [[word:kazozoyo|kazozoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kazoyoth|kazoyoth]] || [[word:kazoyoj|kazoyoj]] || [[word:kazoyosh|kazoyosh]] || [[word:kazoyo|kazoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kazofyoth|kazofyoth]] || [[word:kazofyoj|kazofyoj]] || [[word:kazofyosh|kazofyosh]] || [[word:kazofyof|kazofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kazoyotho|kazoyotho]] || [[word:kazoyojo|kazoyojo]] || [[word:kazoyosho|kazoyosho]] || [[word:kazoyoko|kazoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kazoyoth|kazoyoth]] || [[word:kazoyoj|kazoyoj]] || [[word:kazoyosh|kazoyosh]] || [[word:kazoyo|kazoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kazoyothol|kazoyothol]] || [[word:kazoyojol|kazoyojol]] || [[word:kazoyoshol|kazoyoshol]] || [[word:kazoyokol|kazoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kazoyothotho|kazoyothotho]] || [[word:kazoyojojo|kazoyojojo]] || [[word:kazoyoshosho|kazoyoshosho]] || [[word:kazoyoko|kazoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kazoyothon|kazoyothon]] || [[word:kazoyojon|kazoyojon]] || [[word:kazoyoshon|kazoyoshon]] || [[word:kazoyokon|kazoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kazoyothoro|kazoyothoro]] || [[word:kazoyojoro|kazoyojoro]] || [[word:kazoyoshoro|kazoyoshoro]] || [[word:kazoyokoro|kazoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
